rootCause: The custom content e2e assumed a missing success toast meant the process would be discoverable via IndexedDB, but Playwright runs can fall back to the in-memory custom content store when IndexedDB is unavailable or reset mid-run, so the process exists for the item detail page without ever appearing in the IndexedDB poll.
resolution: Relax the test to treat IndexedDB absence as a warning and continue validating the item detail view, which exercises the same custom content fallback path used by the UI.
